subject: Sump pit dimensions and associated coordination items
main_purpose: Obtain consultant confirmation before continuing embedded MEP and raft works
start_dependency: Reply required before installing sump pit boxes, earthing network, and casting raft concrete
sequence_impact: High - embedded items must be resolved before concrete pour
commercial_impact: Possible prolongation, disruption, and rework if clarification changes executed works; no direct VO unless instruction changes scope
responsibility: Consultant/Designer for clarification; Contractor for timely RFI and execution after reply
risk_owner: Employer/Consultant for late clarification; Contractor for proof and mitigation
eot_potential: Moderate to High if activity is on critical path and notices were preserved
claim_strength: Moderate to Strong, subject to programme linkage and monthly claim account
required_actions: Issue/maintain delay notice; link RFI reply delay to programme activities; include in monthly claim account; keep transmittals, reply, photos, inspection requests, and pour dates

subject: Pump room coordination issues: crane clearance, openings, updated design, and staircase
main_purpose: Clarify whether pump room arrangement is buildable and whether MEP openings/design information are final
start_dependency: Reply required before crane anchors, sleeves/openings coordination, reinforcement closure, and casting
sequence_impact: Medium to High - reply may control slab/column/pump room sequence
commercial_impact: Possible disruption or resequencing; limited extra payment unless instruction changes scope or openings are shifted to others
responsibility: Consultant/Designer for confirmation; Contractor for coordination and proceeding after reply
risk_owner: Employer/Consultant for late reply; Contractor for mitigation and coordination records
eot_potential: Moderate if critical path and no alternative workfront existed
claim_strength: Moderate - late reply exists, but consultant response says dimensions are adequate and proceed
required_actions: Record response delay; show exact affected activities; update programme; reserve rights for any late coordinated openings or rework

subject: Sump pit configuration and penetrating pipe levels for B2/B3 area
main_purpose: Resolve discrepancy between structural and mechanical sump pit arrangements and missing pipe sections/levels
start_dependency: Final sump pit and penetration details required before embedded MEP and raft casting
sequence_impact: High - unresolved penetrations can block reinforcement closure and concrete casting
commercial_impact: Potential prolongation and rework if late details change already approved shop drawings; variation possible only if change is instructed
responsibility: Consultant/Designer for design clarification; Contractor for coordination before reinforcement/casting
risk_owner: Employer/Consultant for late/missing design data; Contractor for timely RFI and evidence
eot_potential: Moderate to High if linked to critical raft activities
claim_strength: Moderate to Strong, depending on proof that works could not proceed safely without reply
required_actions: Keep approved structural drawings, mechanical package, shop drawing comments, RFI, reply, and delayed activity records; include in monthly claim/variation account

subject: Latest infrastructure package clarifications affecting tank and retaining wall penetrations
main_purpose: Confirm final levels, diameters, locations, and connection details before sleeves/puddle flanges and external works
start_dependency: Reply required before fixing wall penetrations, closing shuttering, casting wall side 2, and external pipe installation
sequence_impact: High - wall penetrations must be coordinated before closing/casting and backfill
commercial_impact: Possible prolongation, abortive works, and rework if late infrastructure design changes sleeve sizes/levels; variation possible if new scope is confirmed
responsibility: Consultant/Designer/Employer MEP team for clarification; Contractor for timely coordination and execution after reply
risk_owner: Employer/Consultant for late infrastructure clarification; Contractor for proof and mitigation
eot_potential: Moderate to High if wall/external works are on critical path
claim_strength: Moderate to Strong, especially where latest package introduced new or unclear lines
required_actions: Issue/maintain delay and variation notices; compare old vs latest package; record sleeve/puddle flange impacts; update programme and monthly claim account
